How it works

1️⃣Select the conversion type.
2️⃣Upload your file or paste text.
3️⃣Download the converted document instantly.

Privacy first

All conversions run in your browser. No files are uploaded to a server, and nothing is shared.

Best for

  • 📄 Converting PDF reports to editable Word
  • 📝 Saving notes as PDF
  • 🖼️ Turning images into printable PDF files
  • 📤 Extracting text from PDF pages

Browser-Based File Conversion for PDF, Word, Image, and Text

Compressly's converter lets you transform files without leaving the browser. Convert PDFs into Word documents, turn scanned image files into PDFs, and export plain text as printable PDF documents. Everything happens locally for maximum privacy.

The tool supports DOCX, PDF, JPG, PNG, and WEBP. Whether you need to extract readable text from a PDF, make a photo into a PDF, or generate a PDF from typed notes, Compressly gives you a one-stop converter in the same interface.

For best results, upload a well-formed PDF or a clean document. PDF-to-image conversion creates high-resolution PNG files, while Word-to-PDF and Text-to-PDF produce browser-ready PDF downloads instantly.

Converter FAQ

Is file conversion really local?
Yes. This page uses browser libraries to convert files locally. No upload is performed.
What formats are supported?
PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, WEBP, and plain text. PDF-to-word uses plain text output, while Word-to-PDF supports DOCX files.
How do I convert multiple PDF pages to images?
Upload the PDF and choose PDF → Image. Each page is rendered and shown for download.
Can I convert a Word document to a PDF?
Yes. Upload a DOCX file, then select Word → PDF.
